dict.string: $(DEVELOPMENT_LANGUAGE)
ShieldHop
$(EXECUTABLE_NAME)
$(PRODUCT_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER)
ShieldHop
APPL
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NAME)
$(FLUTTER_BUILD_NUMBER)
LaunchScreen
Main
This app requires access to the camera to take evidence photos and record videos.
This app requires access to the microphone to record audio and video evidence.
This app requires access to your photo library to upload evidence.
This app requires access to your photo library to save evidence.
This app requires access to your location to show your position on the map and check in to tasks.
This app requires access to your location to provide accurate tracking during tasks.
This app requires access to your location for continuous tracking during assigned tasks.
This app requires access to your contacts to invite other employees.
This app requires access to Apple Music for audio functionality.
This app requires access to your calendar to schedule tasks.
This app requires access to motion data for activity tracking.
This app requires speech recognition for hands-free operations.
